subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou by Whose Name the gates of heaven were opened and the near ones hastened to the Most Exalted Horizon! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک فتحت ابواب السماء و سرع المقربون الی الافق الاعلی اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
